title: AUDIENCE-ASK — sunset walk: where is Ginger's island?
prompt: Composition is anchored by @ep12-c15-sunset. Animate the still gently — the three figures stroll forward at a slow gentle pace along the wet shore, holding hands across the frame, staying in their EXACT side-by-side line throughout the entire 10s. There are EXACTLY 3 people in the entire frame, no extras, no additional spawns. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) The three of them stroll gently together along the wet shore, gentle small soft surf lapping at their feet. Papa looks calmly out at the horizon with a warm dad-smile. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara softly turns her head DIRECTLY toward the camera with a warm friend-to-friend wonder-sparkle in her eyes. Sara (gentle warm thoughtful voice, friend-to-friend energy): "Where do YOU think Ginger's island is?" She holds her warm look at the camera waiting cheerfully for the kid watching at home to call out a guess. All three keep gently walking slowly forward in line, holding hands throughout — no running, no leaping, no breaking the line, no crossing positions. Calm cheerful kid-show ocean ambiance throughout — gentle surf, soft seabirds. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing, no shifting, no color drift.
